goal:
Create a new AI agent by clicking the create/add button (usually a + icon or "Create" button).
After the agent is created, send it a test message like "Hello" to verify it responds.
The agent name "CleverPioneer-aywa" may be auto-generated - you don't need to fill in forms manually.
Focus on: 1) Find and click the create button, 2) Verify the agent appears, 3) Send a message.
